summary: i18n Phase A frontend testing FR/EN/ES. LandingPage, /tarifs, /connexion, /adhesion are fully translated with no raw keys and no console errors. Checkout regression: /checkout now renders step 0 without any JS errors (LOT7 refactor bugs from iteration_17 appear fixed). However, several pages have INCOMPLETE translations in EN/ES modes — most notably a second/legacy NavBar+Footer used on /offres, /logiscop, /oscop, /favoris, /listes-achats (French strings 'Accueil', 'Connexion', 'Espace Client', 'Centrale d'achats B2B ESS', 'DOCUMENTS LÉGAUX', 'Convention de partenariat', 'Charte ESS de mutualisation', 'Tous droits réservés' etc.), the ForgotPassword page (/mot-de-passe-oublie: only H1 translated, subtitle/button/links still FR), the buyer dashboard /espace-acheteur (stats cards + quick actions all in FR), and small residues on /catalogue ('8 produits disponibles', category tabs) and /favoris ('0 produits dans vos favoris').

ui_bugs.issue: In EN and ES modes only the H1 title is translated ('Forgot password' / 'Contraseña olvidada'). Subtitle 'Entrez votre email pour recevoir un lien de réinitialisation', primary button 'Envoyer le lien', helper text 'Vous vous souvenez ?', link 'Se connecter', and back link 'Retour à la connexion' remain hardcoded in French.

These pages render a different (non-LandingPage) NavBar with hardcoded FR strings 'Accueil', 'Offres', 'Contact', 'Connexion', 'Espace Client', tagline 'Centrale d'achats B2B ESS'. Same pages render a Footer with hardcoded FR: 'Centrale d'achats B2B ESS - Partenariat officiel pour l'Économie Sociale et Solidaire', 'Mutualisation ESS certifiée', 'DOCUMENTS LÉGAUX', 'CGV KDMARCHE B2B', 'CG O'SCOP', 'Convention de partenariat', 'Charte ESS de mutualisation', '© 2025 Centrale d'Achats B2B ESS - KDMARCHE & O'SCOP. Tous droits réservés.' The LandingPage nav (which shows 'Home / Log in / Join' correctly in EN) is not being reused here.

Header 'Pro Buyer Space' and nav tabs 'Catalog/Orders/Wallet/Documents/Vendor' translated OK, but everything below is in FR when lang=en: breadcrumb 'Accueil > Espace Acheteur', banner 'Voir', stats cards 'Commandes totales / En cours / Total dépensé / Crédits O'SCOP', section 'Commandes récentes' + 'Voir tout', order status badge 'En attente', and quick action cards 'Nouvelle commande / Accéder au catalogue', 'Recharger crédits / Gérer mon wallet', 'Documents légaux / CGV, Contrats'.

In EN mode, product count 'X produits disponibles' remains in FR (should be 'products available'). Category filter tabs 'Alimentaire/Boissons/Hygiène/Épicerie/Produits frais/Surgelés' remain in FR while the 'All' tab is translated. Nav breadcrumb on catalogue still shows 'Accueil > Espace Acheteur > Catalogue' in FR. Also the app-shell nav shows 'Commandes' and 'Espace Acheteur' in FR (while catalogue page's own tabs above show EN).
Counter '0 produits dans vos favoris' remains in FR in EN mode. Rest of page (title, empty state, CTA) is translated.
Localized dates still use fr-FR locale ('16 juil. 2026, 12:11') in EN mode. Consider using i18n.language for date formatting.

action_items: Wire useTranslation into pages/ForgotPasswordPage.jsx and replace all hardcoded FR strings with auth.forgotPassword.* keys (subtitle, button, remember prompt, sign-in link, back link).

Audit which Navbar/Footer components are mounted by /offres, /logiscop, /oscop, /favoris, /listes-achats (they render 'Accueil/Connexion/Espace Client' and 'DOCUMENTS LÉGAUX/CGV KDMARCHE/Tous droits réservés' as raw FR). Either (a) migrate them to the same NavBar used by LandingPage/PricingPage (which is fully i18n'd), or (b) add useTranslation to the legacy nav/footer components. Same fix will resolve residues on /offres reported by initial scan.
Translate BuyerSpacePage.jsx (breadcrumb, stat cards labels, 'Commandes récentes/Voir tout/En attente', quick-action tiles).
Translate remaining strings in CatalogPage.jsx: 'X produits disponibles', category filter labels, and internal breadcrumb.
Translate FavoritesPage.jsx counter '{count} produits dans vos favoris'.
Format order dates with i18n.language (toLocaleDateString(i18n.language)) instead of hardcoded fr-FR.
critical_code_review_comments: Two navbar/footer implementations coexist (the i18n'd one on Landing/Pricing/Login, and a French-hardcoded one on Offers/Logiscop/Oscop/Favorites/ShoppingLists). This dual-source-of-truth will keep leaking FR strings until consolidated.
ForgotPasswordPage clearly missed the Phase A pass — title uses useTranslation but the rest of the JSX uses raw literals.
Buyer dashboard (/espace-acheteur) appears to have been only partially migrated: shell/header translated, content sections not.
Positive: LandingPage EN/ES render is complete and consistent; PricingPage FAQ/plans render clean; /checkout no longer crashes → LOT7 refactor regressions appear resolved.

success_rate.frontend: ~70% pages fully translated; ~30% have partial/no translation of shared chrome or ForgotPassword+BuyerDashboard

test_credentials: acheteur-pro@kdmarche.fr / Demo2026! used successfully. Login form at /connexion (input[type=email], input[type=password], button[type=submit]).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing buyer-org data; a cart item (Riz long grain 5kg x5) was left in the buyer's cart to reach /checkout — main agent may want to clear.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Do NOT test backend (unchanged, 115 tests already green). Focus on Phase A i18n. When retesting: (1) hit /?lang=en, /?lang=es on every page in features list, (2) check /offres /logiscop /oscop /favoris /listes-achats especially — their header+footer are the biggest offenders, (3) /mot-de-passe-oublie is only partly translated, (4) /espace-acheteur main content still FR. Landing page networkidle timeouts are normal (mapbox/stripe WS), use wait_until='domcontentloaded' + 4s sleep. Checkout regression: /checkout step 0 renders without JS errors — LOT7 fix confirmed.
rca of the issue: Two separate NavBar+Footer component trees exist. The LandingPage/PricingPage tree got the useTranslation pass; the tree used by OffersPage/LogiscopPage/OscopPage/FavoritesPage/ShoppingListsPage did not, so header+footer strings on those pages leak as raw French regardless of ?lang=. ForgotPasswordPage was likely skipped in Phase A (only the H1 uses t(); the rest of the JSX uses literal French). BuyerSpacePage was partially migrated — shell has t(), content sections do not.
